title: Easy Elytra Mace
description: It will make it easier for you to learn how to make elytra Mace.
body:
## ABOUT Easy Elytra Mace
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f518806864b813d80e047958f004c37d4c813267.png)
- This mod will make your Minecraft experience easier if you're into or learning PvP. It adds a feature that, if you have a mace in your hand, right-clicking will change your chest piece to an Elytra or vice versa.

> - **IMPORTANT! You must be wearing the chest piece or Elytra, and the second item (presumably an Elytra) must be in quick access slots 1 through 9. Also, if there are two or more chest pieces in quick access slots, the chest piece closest to the first slot will be equipped first.**

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f518806864b813d80e047958f004c37d4c813267.png)
